welcome.title: Welcome to ZMKs Studio
welcome.subtitle: A community-enhanced build of ZMK Studio.
welcome.clientTitle: Use the desktop client for the best experience
welcome.clientDescriptionPrefix: The desktop client can list USB devices directly and connect keyboards over BLE. Browser support still depends on
welcome.deviceListHint: The client discovers available USB and BLE devices automatically. Choose a device to connect.
welcome.webConnectionHint: Browser connections will ask for system permission. Choose your keyboard in the picker that appears.
welcome.bleConnectionDescription: Bluetooth Low Energy, more stable in the desktop client
welcome.usbConnectionDescription: Connect to the keyboard over USB serial
welcome.genericConnectionDescription: Use this transport to connect the keyboard
welcome.connectionUnavailableHint: This environment does not support it. Use the desktop client instead.
welcome.connectionErrorHelpPermission: Reconnect and allow the browser or client to access the device. If permission was denied earlier, re-enable it in system or browser settings.
welcome.connectionErrorHelpUsb: Make sure the keyboard is connected over USB, not already claimed by another app, then reconnect it and refresh.
welcome.connectionErrorHelpBle: Make sure the keyboard is connectable and system Bluetooth is enabled. For BLE, the desktop client is recommended.
welcome.connectionErrorHelpFirmware: Make sure the keyboard firmware has ZMK Studio enabled and supports Studio RPC. Reflash Studio-capable firmware if needed.
welcome.connectionErrorHelpGeneric: Refresh the device list and try again. If it still fails, use the desktop client or reconnect the keyboard.
welcome.connectingDescription: This shows Studio RPC, keymap, layout, behavior, and lighting loading progress. Keep the keyboard connected.
welcome.connectProgressDeviceInfo: Sending getDeviceInfo RPC and waiting for the keyboard
welcome.connectProgressResponse: Device information received, verifying the connection
welcome.connectProgressBehaviors: Loading behavior list and parameter definitions
welcome.connectProgressLighting: Loading lighting, layer LED, and indicator state
welcome.connectedDescription: {{name}} is ready. Opening the editor now.
welcome.noDevices: No devices found. Make sure Studio is enabled on the keyboard and try refreshing.
welcome.unsupportedPrefix: Your browser is not supported. ZMK Studio uses either
welcome.unsupportedSuffix: (Linux only) to connect to ZMK devices.
welcome.chromeBrowser: Use a browser that supports the above web technologies, e.g. Chrome/Edge, or

header.resetWarning: Settings reset will remove any customizations previously made in ZMK Studio and restore the stock keymap
header.confirmResetSettings: Are you sure you want to reset all settings?
header.unlockRequired: Device unlock required to perform this action

about.zmksDescription: ZMKs Studio is a community build based on ZMK Studio. It keeps the upstream ZMK Studio keymap editing workflow and adds this fork's UI, lighting, localization, and desktop client improvements. The original ZMK Studio project and ZMK contributors remain the foundation of this work.
about.sponsorsDescription: ZMK Studio is made possible thanks to the generous donation of time from our contributors, as well as the financial sponsorship from the following vendors:

errors.setActiveLayout: Failed to set the active physical layout

selectBehaviorHint: Hover over a behavior on the left to see its description

behaviorDesc.None: Block the key — events won't pass to layers below
behaviorDesc.Transparent: Pass through to the next active layer below
behaviorDesc.Momentary Layer: Activate a layer while held, deactivate on release
behaviorDesc.To Layer: Switch to a layer and deactivate all others except default
behaviorDesc.Layer-Tap: Hold → activate layer, Tap → send keypress (tap-preferred)
behaviorDesc.Sticky Layer: Activate a layer for the next keypress only (one-shot layer)
behaviorDesc.Sticky Key: Keep a modifier active for the next keypress (one-shot mod)
behaviorDesc.Grave/Escape: Escape by default, grave (`) when Shift or GUI is held
behaviorDesc.Key Toggle: Toggle a key on/off — press to hold, press again to release
behaviorDesc.Caps Word: Auto-capitalize until a non-alphanumeric key is pressed
behaviorDesc.Bluetooth: Manage BT profiles: select, switch, or clear pairings
behaviorDesc.Output Selection: Choose between USB and BLE output
behaviorDesc.Reset: Reset and re-run the current firmware
behaviorDesc.z_so_off: Soft power off. Wake with the on/off or reset button
behaviorDesc.Studio Unlock: Unlock ZMK Studio access on this device

lighting.title: Lighting
lighting.notSupportedDesc: Lighting control is not an official ZMK feature. To use it, you need to build your firmware based on our custom branch and add the RGB-related devicetree overlay configuration.
lighting.turnOnHint: Turn on a light source to adjust settings

layerLed.title: Layer LED
layerLed.selectKey: Click keys or drag to select, then edit color below

capsLock.title: CapsLock Indicator
capsLock.notConfigured: CapsLock indicator not configured in firmware

unlock.title: Unlock To Continue
unlock.body1: For security reasons, your keyboard requires unlocking before using ZMK Studio.
unlock.body2Prefix: If studio unlocking hasn't been added to your keymap or a combo, see the

license.intro: ZMK Studio is released under the open source Apache 2.0 license. A copy of the NOTICE file from the ZMK Studio repository is included here:

errors.failedToConnect: Failed to connect to the chosen device

idle.hint: Click a key above to start editing

download.disclaimer: ZMKs Studio is NOT the official ZMK Studio. Please do not report issues to the official ZMK project.
